# NSHelpAnchorErrorKey

The corresponding value is an [doc://com.apple.foundation/documentation/Foundation/NSString] containing the localized help corresponding to the Help button. See [doc://com.apple.foundation/documentation/Foundation/NSError/helpAnchor] for more information.
title: NSHelpAnchorErrorKey
